title: Story Map: Discovery Generation Pipeline — V10

backbone.name: Define Discovery Scope
backbone.description: PM defines market, segments, geographic scope, and depth level for discovery generation

backbone.name: Generate Environmental Analysis
backbone.description: System generates PESTLE analysis, regulatory tracking, and competitive intelligence

backbone.name: Generate Persona Artifacts
backbone.description: System generates persona archetype packs, narrative cards, and empathy maps

stories.title: As a PM, I can configure discovery depth, maturity band, and geographic scope before generation
As a PM, I can save discovery configuration as a reusable template
As a PM, I can trigger PESTLE generation for a defined market and get a 6-factor analysis with 3-horizon projections

release_slices.name: Discovery MVP — Sprint 10
release_slices.target_outcome: PM can generate complete PESTLE + segment map + persona pack from scratch in <5 minutes
